script.content: We have multiple power outages reported in downtown area. Please dispatch emergency crews and optimize their routes.
I've analyzed the emergency situation and optimized dispatch assignments:

details.Primary Dispatch: Crew A-7 → Main St Substation (15 min ETA)
details.Secondary Dispatch: Crew B-3 → Oak Ave Transformer (22 min ETA)
details.Backup Assignment: Crew C-1 → Pine St Distribution (28 min ETA)
details.Customer Impact: Priority given to hospital and emergency services
details.Parts Availability: All required equipment staged at locations

script.content: What about our scheduled maintenance work for this week? Can we reschedule around the emergency repairs?

Here's the optimized schedule balancing emergency repairs with planned maintenance:

**Emergency Work Priority:**
• All critical outages handled first (estimated completion by 4:30 PM)
• 6 technicians reassigned from routine maintenance

**Rescheduled Maintenance:**
• Tuesday: Routine inspections moved to Thursday (3 locations)
• Wednesday: Planned transformer upgrades postponed to next week
• Friday: Vegetation management continues as scheduled (non-critical area)

**Resource Allocation:**
• Emergency crews: 8 technicians until 5 PM
• Maintenance crews: 4 technicians for scheduled work
• Overtime approved for emergency response team

**Customer Communications:**
• Automatic notifications sent to 2,847 affected customers
• Estimated restoration times provided via text/email
• Website updated with real-time outage map

This maintains our 98.5% reliability target while handling emergencies efficiently.
